Value:
Gyoza Plate, bamboo leaf, 
pansy flower
Allium (onion, garlic), Dairy, Sesame (oil), Soy, Gluten (Wheat), Egg, Sulfites, Nightshade, capsaicin, cilantro, ginger
Unit: g, Qty: 1, Prep: prepped, minced
In a nonstick saute skillet, add oil and water and gyozas and cover with steam lid
Heat to medium or medium high, and cook covered until water has evaporated
Gyozas should be cooked in the wrapper on top, and meat coming up to temp
Uncover and continue cooking to crisp up the bottom of the gyoza wrapper
add more oil if necessary, or more water and continue covering if necessary
once bottoms are crispy, wrapper fully cooked, and meat is up to temp, remove from heat
transfer to a sizzle plate lined with sport towel, allowing to rest crispy bottom-side-up
Plate in a row on the gyoza Catch branded plate, with a bamboo leaf under and flower to side
Serve with ramekin filled with Amazu ponzu and serrano chilis
